TextEquiv.PlainText: 5. d=o suster dinge waljeze Woontn 't dorp Wattormoelle
TextEquiv.Unicode: 5. d=o suster dinge waljeze Woontn 't dorp Wattormoelle

TextEquiv.PlainText: 1 d=o d=o dogter pointje natjere in oneckt geteelt.
TextEquiv.Unicode: 1 d=o d=o dogter pointje natjere in oneckt geteelt.

TextEquiv.PlainText: Bowalanege Kittoe Nainde. . . . . . . bl dat 2 er 2 --
TextEquiv.Unicode: Bowalanege Kittoe Nainde. . . . . . . bl dat 2 er 2 —

TextEquiv.PlainText: Mchottige Pauloe Nainde. btl dertent oe
TextEquiv.Unicode: Mchottige Pauloe Nainde. btl dertent oe

TextEquiv.PlainText: 1: dogter gen=t Iebel in onecht geteeld.
TextEquiv.Unicode: 1: dogter gen=t Iebel in onecht geteeld.
